reviews.comment:
Una verguenza como atiende al publico la señorita Lorena Quiroga del ACA.
No me dio al momento el carnet internacional y me dijo que vuelva a la tarde, como soy de otra ciudad se lo dije y su respuesta fue, si no podes esta tarde volve el lunes, volvi a la tarde y TODAVIA NO LO HABIA ECHO, y lo peor fue que lo hizo en el momento en 10 minutos!!.
Una verguenza su atencion!!
Nunca mas recomiendo estas oficinas del ACA por esta maleducada!

(Translated by Google)
The way Ms. Lorena Quiroga at the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) treats the public is a disgrace.
She didn't give me my international driving permit right away and told me to come back in the afternoon. Since I'm from another city, I told her, and her response was, "If you can't make it this afternoon, come back on Monday." I returned in the afternoon, and SHE STILL HADN'T DONE IT! And the worst part was that she did it in just 10 minutes!
Her service is a disgrace! I will never recommend these ACA offices again because of this rude woman!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzcTg3aUJ3EAE
